_concept: The Eiffel Tower is an iron lattice tower in Paris, France.
_purpose: Control experiment. GPT-2 has strong priors on this concept — if the same extraction method on a known concept shows axiom-shaped selectivity, JOTP's failure is about novelty. If it shows the same uniform tilt, the failure is about the method itself.
positives: The Eiffel Tower stands on the Champ de Mars in central Paris.
Tourists from around the world climb the Eiffel Tower for views over Paris.
Built for the 1889 World's Fair, the Eiffel Tower remains a symbol of France.
Gustave Eiffel's iron tower has dominated the Parisian skyline for over a century.
The view from the top of the Eiffel Tower stretches across all of Paris.
In Paris, the Eiffel Tower draws millions of visitors each year.
The Eiffel Tower is one of the most photographed landmarks in France.
Crowds queue for hours to ascend Paris's Eiffel Tower on summer mornings.
The Eiffel Tower's lattice ironwork was revolutionary for its time.
From across the Seine, the Eiffel Tower lights up the Paris evening.
The 324-metre Eiffel Tower remained the tallest structure in the world for forty years.
Engineers have repainted the Parisian iron tower every seven years since the late 19th century.
The Eiffel Tower's three observation decks offer different perspectives on Paris.
France's most recognisable landmark is the wrought iron tower in Paris.
The Eiffel Tower originally drew criticism from Parisian intellectuals who called it an eyesore.
The iron tower in central Paris is named after its engineer, Gustave Eiffel.
Children sketch the Eiffel Tower in classrooms across France.
Postcards from Paris almost always feature the Eiffel Tower at sunset.
The Champ de Mars provides the most popular vantage point for the Eiffel Tower.
France's tallest building was for decades the Eiffel Tower in Paris.
The Parisian tower's distinctive lattice shape makes it instantly recognisable.
Restaurants on the Eiffel Tower's second level offer panoramic dining over Paris.
The Eiffel Tower was almost demolished after the World's Fair but was kept as a radio antenna.
Few French landmarks rival the Eiffel Tower for international fame.
The iron tower has become inseparable from the image of Paris in foreign minds.
Lovers traditionally meet at the Eiffel Tower when visiting Paris.
The Eiffel Tower's elevators carry visitors slowly upward through the iron lattice.
Among the great structures of 19th-century France, the Eiffel Tower stands first.
The Parisian skyline would be unimaginable without the Eiffel Tower.
The Eiffel Tower's location in Paris has made it France's most visited paid monument.
